---
title: "GIS & Remote Sensing"
subtitle: "Geospatial technologies for mapping, analysis, and Earth observation."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include gis-remote-sensing/00-syllabus.md >}}


Welcome to the **GIS & Remote Sensing** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course covers the principles and applications of Geographic Information Systems and satellite-based remote sensing.

---

## Remote Sensing Principles & DIP
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/20-remote-sensing-principles.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/01-remote-sensing-applications.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/17-digital-image-processing.md >}}

---

## GIS Fundamentals & Spatial Data Models
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/18-fundamentals-of-gis.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/03-geographic-information-system-gis.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/22-spatial-data-models.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/02-digital-mapping.md >}}

---

## Spatial Analysis & Geospatial Applications
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/21-spatial-analysis-techniques.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/15-applications-of-gis-rs.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/19-recent-advances.md >}}

---

## Cartography & Advanced Mapping Techniques
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/05-maps-as-a-tool-in-geographical-studies.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/06-types-of-maps.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/04-thematic-maps.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/09-mapping-techniques.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/10-choropleth-maps.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/11-isopleth-maps.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/12-chorochromatic-maps.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/13-pie-diagrams.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/14-accessibility-and-flow-maps.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/07-techniques-for-studying-spatial-patterns-of-distribution.md >}}
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/08-single-purpose-and-composite-maps.md >}}

---

## Practical Resources & Interview Prep
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/23-gis-rs-interview-qa.md >}}

<!-- Metadata Cleanup -->
{{< include gis-remote-sensing/16-course-content.md >}}
